scripts.text:
USE P21Play;
SET NOCOUNT ON;
SELECT
    database_name = DB_NAME(),
    current_user_name = CURRENT_USER,
    system_user_name = SYSTEM_USER,
    original_login_name = ORIGINAL_LOGIN();

SELECT
    entity_name = 'p21_get_counter',
    object_id = CONVERT(nvarchar(40), OBJECT_ID('dbo.p21_get_counter')),
    execute_permission = CONVERT(nvarchar(10), HAS_PERMS_BY_NAME('dbo.p21_get_counter', 'OBJECT', 'EXECUTE')),
    view_definition_permission = CONVERT(nvarchar(10), HAS_PERMS_BY_NAME('dbo.p21_get_counter', 'OBJECT', 'VIEW DEFINITION'));

SELECT
    permission_name,
    subentity_name
FROM sys.fn_my_permissions('dbo.p21_get_counter', 'OBJECT')
ORDER BY permission_name;

SELECT
    counter_name = c.name,
    counter_object_id = CONVERT(nvarchar(40), c.object_id),
    has_select = CONVERT(nvarchar(10), HAS_PERMS_BY_NAME('dbo.' + c.name, 'OBJECT', 'SELECT')),
    has_update = CONVERT(nvarchar(10), HAS_PERMS_BY_NAME('dbo.' + c.name, 'OBJECT', 'UPDATE')),
    object_type = c.type_desc
FROM sys.objects AS c
WHERE c.name LIKE '%counter%' OR c.name LIKE '%sequence%'
ORDER BY c.name;

SELECT
    sequence_name = s.name,
    current_value = CONVERT(nvarchar(80), s.current_value),
    has_update = CONVERT(nvarchar(10), HAS_PERMS_BY_NAME('dbo.' + s.name, 'OBJECT', 'UPDATE')),
    has_select = CONVERT(nvarchar(10), HAS_PERMS_BY_NAME('dbo.' + s.name, 'OBJECT', 'SELECT'))
FROM sys.sequences AS s
WHERE s.name LIKE '%counter%' OR s.name LIKE '%container%' OR s.name LIKE '%vessel%'
ORDER BY s.name;
